entry.title: UFO 50 v0.2.1
entry.content:
Fixed Night Manor Cherry (again)
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/UFO-50-Archipelago/Archipelago/compare/0.1.9...0.2.1

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v82
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.3): - "alternates" for logic - other changes to logic: locations are removed if any required region is excluded, levels detected differently, gear licenses not required if the setting is off - integrate always on level - The Pre-Sequel initial integration

entry.title: Bloons TD6 v0.6.2
entry.content: - Reworked Difficulty option completely to allow for better customisation - Updated Level logic - Fixed knowledge logic - Added location groups for: 'Heroes', 'Knowledge', 'Level', 'Rounds', 'poptiers', Each Mode e.g. 'Chimps' or 'Medium', Each difficulty e.g. 'beginner' or 'advanced'

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Spirit Tracks v0.7.6
entry.content:
Compatible with seeds generated in v0.7.x [Setup guide and useful info](https://github.com/DayKat/spirit-tracks/blob/main/worlds/tloz_st/docs/setup.md)
- `Goron Village Get Wagon` is no longer in pool when randomize cargo is off - Starting items from pool no longer duplicate if they're in a pre-fill pool - Carben no longer boards train with no passengers option - Receiving a deathlink on train sets your health to 1 instead of 0, preventing softlocks, but still making you die in one hit. - Steem no loger make you play his song again on repeat visits - Added delay reset to pirate hideout rewards - Fixed vanilla item for `Wooded Temple 3f SE Chest` - Fixed client crash from `/goal` command - UT dungeon events light up on collecting even if the event is out of logic

entry.title: Deltarune v1.2.99
entry.content:
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta or the Ch1+2 Demo will not work.)
**>>> This is an unstable pre-release. Unless you're testing, we recommend using version v1.2.1 instead. <<<**

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.9.8.post3
entry.content:
Added yaml-less generation for Universal Tracker. Added missing Ostyanka buildings. Added missing Wurzagg buildings. Fixed Lizardmen generation error with sanity mode.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.9.7...v0.9.8

entry.title: Deltarune v1.2.99
entry.content:
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta or the Ch1+2 Demo will not work.)
**>>> This is an unstable pre-release. Unless you're testing, we recommend using version v1.2.1 instead. <<<**

entry.title: TCG Card Shop Simulator v1.0.0.post2
entry.content:
AP World for v1.0.0
This is for testing only. generation problems and more beware. UT is now supported.
[AP Client](https://github.com/FyreDay/TCG-CardShop-Sim-APClient/releases/tag/v1.0.0-Pre2)
Fixed UT Starting items Fixed No Formats Fixed No Card Opening checks Updated Yaml descriptions

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Phantom Hourglass v0.9.3a0
entry.content:
Compatible with seeds generated in v9.0+ [Setup Guide](https://github.com/carrotinator/Archipelago/blob/main/worlds/tloz_ph/docs/setup.md)
- Allowed getting `ToI 3F Key Drop` location after jumping on the floor - Adjusted some more small key drop collision boxes, that may have been stealing keys - Map Warp is no longer active when disabled in the settings - this could also cause inaccessible areas to be show as in logic in UT, since successfully priming a warp adds a logical path shortcut to that destination. - Courage Crest room properly resets salvage spot, preventing the location from being sent randomly at sea - Linebeck will no longer make you blow the dust off the NW sea chart - Can no longer collect Ojibe's item multiple times - Picking up shields dropped by like-likes no longer sends the nearest location - Fixed softlock from getting treasure maps from shops - Fixed fog disappearing early with vanilla fog setting - UT boss event diamonds now only show for (known) required bosses - UT boss events now connect even when obtained out of logic

entry.title: Conbunn Cardboard v0.1.2
entry.content: - [ApWorld] Added reading the museum book as a check - [ApWorld] Added the cable car as an item

entry.title: Mega Man Zero 3 v0.2.5
entry.content:
Weapons have been added to the item pool! This is currently slightly buggy so it is optional for now.
# Changes - Added Zero's four weapons as optional obtainable items. - Added EX Skill location checks for the three levels that didn't have them. - Fixed issue regarding the client running on mGBA emulator
# Known Bugs - If you only have one weapon selected from the start, you will still have access to the buster. This is hard coded by the game and will be fixed at a later date.

entry.title: Rabbit and Steel v0.3.0.post2
entry.content:
DLC update, wasn't focusing on existing bugs, so they may still exist.
# Changelog
All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.
The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/) and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).
## [v0.3.0](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/compare/v0.2.9...v0.3.0) - 2026-05-15
### Merged
- Adding the Extra Mode content to the RnS mod [`#8`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/pull/8)
### Commits
- Update mod version [`c7953c1`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/c7953c1b8097f4207ccb93026ae8ac00c0d009de) - Adding the new classes to the mod. [`476fdca`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/476fdca743c386c36dcb637f62a8311963b3d0a4) - Adding the new regions to the mod. [`028a7fe`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/028a7fe928254e255650ad283e5869e6d565a124) - Fixed route selection with dlc [`1ee1120`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/1ee11200e4c9225e01db7b0e8515f3df73086676) - Fix Class locking [`d6405d4`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/d6405d4b62b1499a242bf1afead269d5bb5412a9) - Starting to add extra mod options [`5068dc1`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/5068dc1772a91effc6b95b56f671ab23c489ba59) - Correct how we read reloadeds path [`ef62d38`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/ef62d386d789bedea14fe8566761607bfd2a7776) - DLC update + some bug fixes [`8861907`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/8861907a6a6c833b61a2b8a3e1b1b254d184149d)

entry.title: Dark Souls Remastered v0.1.0b0
entry.content: Backup of v0.1.0 from Arson's repo

entry.title: Dark Souls Remastered v0.1.1b0
entry.content: v0.1.1 backup from arson's repo

entry.title: Dark Souls Remastered v0.1.2
entry.content:
## New features: Add "warp_to_all_bonfires" option - on by default. This has a side effect where the target of the warp becomes your new respawn point upon death/homeward/dark sign. Added to client "custom controls" the ability to change bonfire warp menu sort types (alphabetical, vanilla, progression), and to optionally use changed/enhanced names instead of "vanilla" ones. Added connection details and custom control options persisting between client sessions.
## Changes: Removed "bonfire warp unlock" checks. Syncing is now done via AP data storage.

entry.title: Dark Cloud 1 v0.5.0
entry.content:
# Dark Cloud 1 AP Rando v0.5.0 || Progression Balancing Edition
- NOTE: removed client from this patch due to a bug. Use 0.5.1 - Now requires 0.6.7 of AP
## Client Changes - Host/slot info is now saved to a file in the directory the client is run from - Buildings can now be received while in town for all towns EXCEPT the current one by going into georama mode (select button). Still need to update town building to work for current town. - For example, if in Norune, you can receive geo for all 5 other towns, but you'd need to go to Matataki or others and repeat to get Norune. Sphere 1 will still require entering a dungeon for now. - Pieces for buildings can also be received in the same way for current town if the building they go in has already been received. NOTE: This bullet does not apply to the new Progressive Char Building. - Added protection from item release on save state load - Changed where on the mem card I'm storing things so fishing is reenabled and the bonus garnet removed - Fixed bug allowing early access to the Genie fight - Adjusted Matataki auto build placements to make accessing Treant easier
## Progression Changes - Poptracker will need updating - Added new `memory_count` option to select how many complete pieces of Seda's memory are required for accessing the Genie fight so all 62 georama aren't necessarily required - Created option `progressive_chars` that makes character recruitment buildings (Player's House, Cacao's House, King's Hideout, 3 Sisters' House) grouped as one progression item: Progressive Char Building. This should reduce the pain of cat jail. Matataki River is not in the list since it also is necessary for some MCs. - Added progression gate for final dungeon so Ungaga doesn't give 2.5 full dungeons. One of the HGR/L parts and one of the TIR/L parts each need to be completed, plus Osmond recruited to access the final dungeon. Trying to reduce the sudden flood of locations somewhat.
## Rule logic changes - Fixed a logic issue where the Horned Key was not logically required for fighting Dran if chests are shuffled. Sundew for Utan as well. Should only have affected minimal access settings. - Rearranged region rule logic for a little more speed on generation - Converted rules to use rulebuilder. Generation is now even fasterer than the above note and the code is cleaner as well!
## Misc. Changes - "Progressive Matataki River" is now just "Matataki River" - Chest locations outside SMT were given names that reflect they are in SMT exterior and are chests

entry.title: PixelDraw v1.3.0
entry.content:
**Update 1.3.0**
_Archipelago Changes:_
- Fixed receiving compatibility chips counting as actions - Removed already-found locations on connect - Updated setup instructions - Added a flashbang trap - Fixed chip pack logic - Accounted for completion shape and needed patterns in completion condition logic - Made the randomize compatibility chips option default to true - Fixed some option configurations not generating correctly

entry.title: Flipwitch Forbidden Sex Hex v1.1.5
entry.content:
New Feature: - New setting that lets you watch the skipped cutscenes if you want. - Untested.
Changes: - Slight modification of how the wand code gives a wand to the player. - Might be more consistent, dunno.
Bugfix: - Makes the connection authenticator return early if it fails.
Unreplicable Bug: - Some bosses don't fight you. If someone can give me more details let me know but it doesn't happen to me.

entry.title: Flipwitch Forbidden Sex Hex v1.1.6
entry.content: Bugfix: - Fixed region connectors for First Drop Regions. - The regions were split into Top and Bottom section, for the pots, but some of the lower connectors still connected to the top erroneously which let you get the pots more easily logically but not in-game. - Fixed the bottom three pots being in the top region.

entry.title: Conbunn Cardboard v0.1.3
entry.content: - [ApWorld] Fixed Museum Book Check not existing - [Client] Fixed Subzone doors not appearing despite having the transition for them (visual glitch)

entry.title: Deltarune v1.2.99
entry.content:
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta or the Ch1+2 Demo will not work.)
>>> This is an unstable pre-release. Unless you're testing, we recommend using version v1.2.1 instead. <<<

entry.title: Ape Escape v0.9.9.post2
entry.content:
## Version 0.9.9 - Fixes again! Please read the setup guides for information on how to setup this game for Archipelago : [English](https://github.com/Thedragon005/Archipelago-Ape-Escape/blob/apeescape/worlds/apeescape/docs/setup_en.md) / [French](https://github.com/Thedragon005/Archipelago-Ape-Escape/blob/apeescape/worlds/apeescape/docs/setup_fr.md)
* **Client and logic fixes** - Changed behavior of having 1x Progressive Water Net (Swim) : It will now more accurately set the oxygen level using vanilla behavior - Entering Water Net training equips Stun Club (while in that training) - Training Rooms not setting the Gadget selection to the correct layout when exiting - Oxygen staying depleted when exiting a level while underwater or being in a boat - Fixed Gladiator Attack not being registered as 100% Complete correctly in Level Select - Races not getting affected correctly by `allowcollect` function for Level Select - Jackets were sometime sending when going through a transition - FastWarp not working sometimes - MM Specter Room Jacket sent immediately when using the FastWarp for mmtoken goal - Fixed a crash happening using the Hoop while exiting Hoop Training - EntrancePlando option now shows WORLD-LEVEL notation to stay in the correct order when generating YAML - Fixed 7-3 Crumbling Castle Jacket - Flooded Basement and 8-1 City Park Jacket - Barrel Room being inverted in the region creation
## Known bugs * Stadium Attack and Gladiator Attack will sometime play the "entering level" music instead of their intended track.
**\*Don't forget to do "Generate Template Options" after installing the ``apworld`` if you want the new options in the YAML\***
Tracker for this apworld version : [Ape Escape Tracker 0.6.2](https://github.com/lurch9229/Ape-Escape-Tracker/releases/tag/0.6.2)
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Thedragon005/Archipelago-Ape-Escape/compare/v0.9.8....v0.9.9

entry.title: Portal 2 v0.7.1
entry.content:
## Additions Minor bug fixes to speedrun logic and start inv from pool with Upgraded Portal Gun or PotatOS See the [mod page](https://github.com/GlassToadstool/Portal2ArchipelagoMod/releases/tag/0.7.0) for previous additions.
## Note You must use the latest (v0.7.0) version of the [Portal 2 Archipelago Mod](https://github.com/GlassToadstool/Portal2ArchipelagoMod/releases/tag/0.7.0) with this version of the apworld.

entry.title: Metroid Prime v0.5.4
entry.content:
# Apworld changes : - Prefill is now done when creating locations - Removed Missile Launcher from pool if mains aren't required - Removed Main Power Bomb from pool if mains aren't required - Vanilla ROM detected is its own status and can be seen in /status - Client can now process arguments from command line - Client Tracker is now a thing - UT integration has been added - Non local items now override starting room loadout - Added mp1_iso argument to override iso path of host.yaml - Moved cosmetic options (suit and hud) to host.yaml - Can now customize default options in host.yaml - Improved emulator settings in host.yaml - Improves support for tooltips in Options Creator and for template yaml - Added Metroid: Samus Returns offworld models support
# Bug fixes : - Fixed Progressive Bomb being always on when only Progressive Beams are on - Fixed first Power Bomb not giving the correct amount of ammo - Fixed locked door type being unusable - Added cutscene and IGT check before allowing receiving items - Fixed credits not adjusting properly to options
# Logic has been updated : - Fixed logic bug with Chozo Ice Temple not requiring bombs - Added missing Scan Visor check for climbing Sun Tower - Added option check for beating Flaahgra with PBs - Removing unneeded duplicate check for Main Quarry item - Mine Security Station wouldn't check for Wave Beam pirates - Added Wave Beam pirates as a check to go the top of Elite Research - Ore Processing to Elevator Access A was wrongly checking for PB and Grapple - Ore Processing tricks required bombs when it wasn't needed - Fixed Chozo Ruins - Sun Tower, you cannot climb it with Spring Ball from bottom
# Library changes : - Updated ppc-asm to 1.6.1
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/UltiNaruto/MetroidAPrime/compare/v0.5.3...v0.5.4

entry.title: Lego Star Wars: The Complete Saga v1.4.4
entry.content:
This release is fully compatible with seeds generated by earlier 1.4.x versions.
# Known issues: - `Yoda` and `Yoda (Ghost)` have gained the ability to perform a buggy wall jump due to the extra flags they have been given, these will be swapped to a different flag that actually does nothing. - The world's logic thinks that `Yoda` can wear hats (`Yoda (Ghost)` is unaffected).
# Fixes: - Fix a couple of cases that could prevent in-game messages from being displayed. - Fix the check that the game has loaded enough to be patched.
# Changes: - Free Play picking a character that can zap has been replaced with picking a character that can remove Droideka shields, so it now includes all Jedi and Bounty Hunters in addition to characters that have zappers.

entry.title: Mario Kart Double Dash v1.0.0rc1
entry.content:
There's a TON of new features here so I decided to make a test build to find all the eluding problems! **NOTE**: This is prerelease version, there might be bugs!
Known problems: incompatible with widescreen hack and probably other gecko codes too.
Download a new apworld and options template below and have a good one! If this is your first time playing MKDD AP, here's the [setup guide](docs/en_Setup.md) and [readme](https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash).
## New Features * Boxsanity (single boxes or box groups as checks) * Shortcuts as locations * Random item as filler * Frantic items * Guaranteed items (ensures you get an item if one is unlocked and fits your current position) * Progressive starting position item * Item rain traps * Overlapping start trap * Prevent extra items if starting inventory * Entrance info in hint info * Option for faster 50cc/100cc * All Cup Tour minimum rank and CC settings ## Changes * Trophy requirement is now percentage based (to suit better randomized options) * Improve unlocked command visually * Increase the level expectation for staff ghosts * Raise caps for items and kart upgrades * Raise extra trophy max amount * Handle connection error gracefully ## Fixes * Quite a lot, and probably broke a few things too!
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/compare/v0.3.2...v1.0.0rc1

entry.title: Ori and the Blind Forest v0.4.2
entry.content:
Fixes - Fixed issue where unbeatable seeds would be created when setting require_final_escape option to false and accessibility to minimal
This version is meant to be used with any v0.4.x version of the client side mod.

entry.title: Symphony of the Night v0.8.16
entry.content: Fixed typo on randomize_candles

entry.title: Dark Cloud 1 v0.5.0
entry.content:
# Dark Cloud 1 AP Rando v0.5.1
## Changes - Fixed an item duplication bug with the new Progressive Char Building item - Added `progressive_chars` to the slot data for poptracker use - Added `extra_char_buildings` that will give another part for each char building + another river piece. Works with `progressive_chars`. Parts of Well 3 are removed to balance item/location counts. No impact on logic/tracker from this. - Similarily, made a server change that will allow starting with individual char building items (King's Hideout, etc.) even with `progressive_chars` on
Client should work with older worlds

entry.content:

entry.title: YARG v0.0.17
entry.content:
# Use Client Version 0.0.5+. No Client Update Required!
New: - Support for the YARN Requests Pack 2

entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!

[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.3): - "alternates" for logic - other changes to logic: locations are removed if any required region is excluded, levels detected differently, gear licenses not required if the setting is off - integrate always on level - The Pre-Sequel initial integration

entry.title: Deep Rock Galactic v0.18.4.1
entry.content:
** Hotfix for 0.18.4 Uncommon Bug (Compatible with previous 0.18 Versions)**
- Fixed a line of code that would sometimes not let an ap client read from the aplocations.txt file (Only requires a client update to fix, no need to regen any multiworlds)
**INFO FILES** [INSTRUCTIONS](https://docs.google.com/document/d/16At-2kS_azJRf9PdUcZeA8Esfoh6kNm2dWVWy8u8wA0/edit?usp=sharing) [MOD on MOD.IO](https://mod.io/g/drg/m/test-archipelago-integration#description) [SIDELOADER for DRG Mods](https://github.com/trumank/mint)

entry.title: SMW: Spicy Mycena Waffles v1.3.7
entry.content: loogic ## Info * [Information](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/) * [Full Changelog](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/changelog/#1.3.7) ## Changes * Banned center Star tile in Star World to have its potential destination on the same map * Updated logic * Ludwig Castle now properly requires Run for the last room location * Fixed DP2 secret exit * DP1 no longer assumes Enemy Shuffle seeds * Fixed Yellow Yoshi availability only considering P-Switch * Mondo now properly requires Swim on its exit rules * VS3 midway point now requires Swim to match the rest of the level

entry.title: Ty the Tasmanian Tiger v1.5.0
entry.content: For the client plugin and changelog, see [Ty1 AP Client](https://github.com/xMcacutt-Archipelago/Ty1AP-Client)

entry.title: Here Comes Niko! v0.8.3
entry.content:
## Logic - Added 'Home Textbox' requirement to `Chatsanity: Global` locations ## Installation 1. Double click the apworld or open ArchipelagoLauncher and `Install APWorld` 2. Open ArchipelagoLauncher 3. `Generate Template Options` to get the yaml or use the one under the release
## Playing 1. Setup your yaml and put it in `...\Archipelago\Players` 2. Click `Generate` on the ArchipelagoLauncher 3. `...\Archipelago\output` should have a AP_XXX.zip 4. Host locally via `Host` on the ArchipelagoLauncher OR Upload the zip to the [website](https://archipelago.gg/uploads) 5. Follow the Install instructions for the [Mod](https://github.com/niieli/NikoArchipelagoMod?tab=readme-ov-file#installation)
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/niieli/Niko-Archipelago/compare/0.8.2...0.8.3

entry.title: A Link Between Worlds v0.2.1
entry.content:
This release is backward compatible with v0.2.1.
Changes: - Improvements to auto tracking - Option `start_inventory_from_pool` now available - Automatic hinting of Street Merchant and Mother Maiamai items (if progression or useful) - Faster patching times - Change to the way the library is unpacked that should hopefully reduce bugs

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.5.post2
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.5
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: Mario Kart Double Dash v1.0.0rc2
entry.content:
Another "nightly" build (referring to time I'm making these, not regularity). Fixes a few problems found in rc1, and I may have snuck a new feature in too accidentally.
**NOTE**: This is prerelease version, there might be bugs!
Known problems: incompatible with widescreen hack and probably other gecko codes too.
## New Features * Add ingame text for various things * GP Race Skips in cup selection screen * All Cup Tour requirements when ACT is selected (also accessible via `/unlocked`) * Current kart and characters with their upgrades/items in pause screen in GP * Good and staff times for current course in TT * See [v1.0.0rc1](https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/releases/tag/v1.0.0rc1) for other things new for v1.0.0 ## Fixes * Fix frantic items option not accepting named values * Fix generation error when goal is trophies
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/compare/v1.0.0rc1...v1.0.0rc2

entry.title: Dark Souls Remastered v0.1.3
entry.content:
# **Dark Souls Remastered Apworld & Client v0.1.3**
## The "Keychains and Curses" Update
### Version update -> 0.1.3. Both apworld and client have updated. Client should be compatible with all 0.1.x generated apworlds
## New features: * Add Fogwall Keychain and Boss Fogwall Keychain key items - instead of the many Fog Wall Key items and Boss Fog Wall Key items, you now have 2 keychain items whose extended descriptions tell you which fog walls you have unlocked. * Add ghost_difficulty yaml options - with possible values of normal, ghosts_are_not_ghostly, or (default) rickert_sells_curses. Less death-runs in New Londo! See the template yaml file or option creator tooltips for more information. * Add /options command to print out the apworld options the client knows about.
## Fixes: * As a result of Fogwall Keychain implementation, running out of key item slots should no longer happen, so the "player stops receiving key items after 64 key item slots are filled" issue will no longer occur. _Note: If you load an existing save from pre-0.1.3 with this client, it is recommended to still drop all your non-keychain "fog wall key" items, in case you already had a fairly full inventory with them - but you should not receive any more of them in the future._

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v84
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.3): - "alternates" for logic - other changes to logic: locations are removed if any required region is excluded, levels detected differently, gear licenses not required if the setting is off - integrate always on level - The Pre-Sequel initial integration - Tracker tab in Client if UT is intalled

entry.title: Donkey Kong Country 2 v3.1.2
entry.content: Small round of fixes ## Info * [Info](https://thelx5.github.io/dkc2/index.html) * [Download](https://github.com/TheLX5/Archipelago/releases/tag/dkc2-v3.1.2) * [Trivia (REQUIRED TO PLAY)](https://github.com/TheLX5/DKC2-Trivia/releases/latest) ## Changes * Fixed KONG checks being sent in levels with uninitialized SRAM * Fixed DamageLink handling causing incoming DeathLink and TrapLink signals crash the client * Adjusted Windy Well logic (Loose)

entry.title: R.E.P.O v0.4.1
entry.content:
Mod * Fixed several issues caused by code changes in REPO 0.4.0 * Fixed re-rolled ap items not displaying their name for clients * Fixed extra upgrade spawn positions and cosmetic box display name * Added all new items from the Cosmetic Update to logic * Undid shop rework from 0.4.0 * The old rework happened when the secret shop was much harder to reach, meaning that a player could be soft-locked if they needed secret items but could not reach the shop itself. With the new shop layouts added in the cosmetic update, this change made the secret shop way too powerful. * Several more re-roll fixes * Ensured that non-ap upgrades are properly replaced when initially spawning upgrades * Prevented blank ap items from spawning after a re-roll * Gave ap items a 50% chance to be selected when rerolling upgrades * Fixed an edge case that resulted in duplicate ap items if some ap items were taken out of the machine before re-rolling
Apworld * Added Cosmetic Update store items to logic * Changed several item classifications and required energy crystals for victory * Changed soul logic * Souls now accounts for stunned strength breakpoints * Since some monsters take 13 strength to kill, we have to have 13 strength upgrades minimum. To balance that, there are now at least 3 of all other upgrades. * updated option descriptions
This version of the mod **is** compatible with previous multiworlds, but store items added in the Cosmetic Update will not spawn when connected to an old multiworld.

entry.title: plateup v0.2.6.4
entry.content:
## What's New?
* Added functionality for `allow_save_file_editing` as it now directly modifies the garage system * Trap cards are now capped at 20 total * Trap card generation now enforces that enough removal items exist to reasonably deal with them
## New YAML Option
**allow_save_file_editing** — Allows the client to directly modify parts of the PlateUp save file. This is primarily used for garage handling and setting the required player level automatically. Defaults to **false**.
```yaml allow_save_file_editing: # Allow the client to make direct edits to your PlateUp save file. # Modifying player level (set to level 17), modifying garage. # When enabled, the client may write to your save file to apply these changes. # When disabled, no save file modifications are made. # Note: enabling this disables the appliances_kept option — # items_kept will be sent as 0 and appliance retention will be handled # via save file edits instead. 'false': 50 'true': 0 ```
## Balance Changes
* Trap card progression should now be significantly less likely to spiral into completely unmanageable runs * Removal items are now guaranteed to exist in sufficient quantity relative to the amount of trap cards generated * The trap card cap of 20 is intended to stop seeds from becoming excessively cluttered with unavoidable negatives
[Mod Update 0.2.6.4](https://github.com/CazIsABoi/PlateUpAPMod/releases/tag/0.2.6.4)

entry.title: HITMAN World of Assasination v0.8.2
entry.content: * Fixed UT crash when connecting to a slot with more than 22 required contract pieces * Fixed Heavy Snipers appearing in Everything-Package * Fixed Logic Errors for Sniper Assassin Locations, which wrongly assumed a Briefcase can be brought into Berlin and Mendoza using the default Starting Location * Fixed Location "Elimination - Erich Soders" being unobtainable
